messages.subject: Your verification code is 123456
messages.body_text:

messages.subject: Security Alert: New login to your account
messages.body_text:
We detected a new login to your account from:

Location: Beijing, China

If you didn't log in, please secure your account immediately.

messages.subject: Weekly Newsletter - March Edition
messages.body_text:
Welcome to the March edition of our newsletter!

messages.subject: Re: Project Update Meeting
messages.body_text:
Hi,

Thanks for the update. The meeting notes look good.
Let's schedule a follow-up for next week.

Best regards,
Zhang Wei

messages.subject: GitHub Security: New personal access token created
messages.body_text:
A new personal access token (classic) was recently created for your account.

If you did not make this change, please contact GitHub Support.
